part: F - Route D Continuation from P28E

routeD.ceoMandateText: Route D is the only acceptable non-operator-gated next round. P27 naming audit / scanner consolidation / phase registry housekeeping are explicitly forbidden as next-round main task.
routeD.axisAContribution: PIT-safe Feature Availability Registry v1 defines the contract structure for all 6 feature sources. This is the structural foundation for P29-B (NewsEvent/FinancialReport source plan) and future formal PIT gate validation.
routeD.parallelismNote: P29-A runs in parallel with operator source acquisition. Completing P29-A does not depend on operator and does not affect P26F4 state.

previewNextRounds.taskName: NewsEvent / FinancialReport Real Source Acquisition Plan
previewNextRounds.note: Research and document real source options for both FinancialReport and NewsEvent. No DB write. No scoring change.
Define unified backtest/replay/simulation contract. No DB write. No optimizer execution.
Formally audit PIT gates for StockQuote / MarketRegime / InstitutionalChip to advance status from AVAILABLE_NEEDS_VALIDATION to AVAILABLE_PIT_SAFE.
